description_long: This bungalow features a sprawling, L-shaped layout with a red-tiled hip roof and beige exterior walls. The structure is surrounded by a low boundary wall, enclosing a spacious yard on three sides. Multiple large windows and glass doors are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The roof includes several skylights or vents, and the building has a mix of single and double-story sections. The front entrance is accentuated by a covered porch area, and the overall design is both functional and inviting, suitable for suburban or upscale urban neighborhoods. The architectural style blends traditional bungalow elements with modern touches, emphasizing comfort and openness.
description: A large, L-shaped bungalow with a red-tiled hip roof, beige walls, and expansive windows, surrounded by a low boundary wall and featuring a covered porch.
description_view_0: Front and left sides are visible, showing the main entrance, covered porch, and multiple large windows.
description_view_1: Rear and right sides are visible, highlighting the extended yard, boundary wall, and back windows.
description_view_2: Direct rear view, showing the full width of the building, rear windows, and the enclosed yard.
description_view_3: Right side and partial rear are visible, with a clear view of the side yard and secondary entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
